title: UPI OC 160 – Disabling Interchange fee movement in dispute & adjustment life cycles
text:
NPCI/UPI/OC No.160/2022-23

To,
All Member Banks, Unified Payment Interface (UPI)

Madam / Dear Sir,

NEED

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

28" December, 2022

Subject: Disabling Interchange Fee movement in dispute & adjustment life cycles for UPI Domestic

Transactions

This has reference to the member banks request submitted to NPCI for disabling Interchange fee + GST in
disputes & adjustment life cycles to limit raising of credit & debit notes under GST Law. NPCI had put up the
member banks request in Steering Committee Meeting (SCM) held on 10" Mar 2021, the committee has thereby
agreed and approved the same. Please take note of the below list consisting of life cycles for which Interchange

Fee + GST movement will be disabled:

S.No_| Dispute /Adjustment Type

1 Wrong Credit Chargeback
2 Wrong Credit Chargeback Re- 8
Presentment
3 Chargeback

Re-presentment

Fraud Chargeback

6 Fraud Chargeback
Presentment

Re-

Dispute /Adjustment Type

Pre Arbitration Acceptance

Deferred Pre Arbitration Acceptance / Deemed
Acceptance

Disabling of Interchange fee + GST shall be applicable on the aforesaid list from 1*t January 2023 (settlement
date) onwards. There will be no reversal of Interchange fee + GST on disputes/ adjustments raised prior to this
date i.e. 1* January 2023. Effective date of the aforesaid changes will be 1 January 2023.

Please note, there will be no change in the report formats however Interchange & GST values will be

shown as zero.

Member banks are requested to take a note of the above and disseminate the information contained herein to the

concerned officials.

For any queries or clarification, please contact:

Name Email Id

Mobile no

Amrita Shiroor
Swapnil More

amrita.shiroor@npci.org.in
swapnil.more@npci.org.in

9326000318

Cunle
